text: The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.

top matches.text: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes, the data subject shall have the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing.
top matches.embedding text: actions: have action: have object: the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing. actor: the data subject condition: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes text: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes, the data subject shall have the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing.

top matches.text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes.
top matches.embedding text: actions: no action: no object: longer be processed for such purposes. actor: the personal data condition: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes.

top matches.text: The data subject shall have the right to object, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her which is based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1), including profiling based on those provisions.
